positive: A stylized minimalist depiction of a majestic mountain range at sunrise, viewed from a gentle, rolling meadow. The scene should feature sharp, clean silhouettes of pine trees and distant peaks against a vibrant, gradient sky transitioning from deep indigo to soft apricot and gold. The composition must be centrally balanced, with negative space emphasizing the sky and the crisp edge of the mountain profile. Use a limited, complementary color palette (deep blues, burnt oranges, forest greens). Perfect for high-contrast screen printing on apparel, vector-style graphic elements, intricate linework, clean lines, high resolution, maximal clarity.
